{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Valinhall garden
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Valinhall garden]] contains a huge fruit tree in its center.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
